title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 208.260 - Funds appropriated to transportation department, duty to administer — distribution of funds, how determined
text:
208.260.  Funds appropriated to transportation department, duty to administer — distribution of funds, how determined. — Funds appropriated for this program shall be appropriated to and administered by the department of transportation.  The distribution of funds to corporations shall be determined on the basis of ridership, cost and alternative transportation means available.
(L. 1976 S.B. 875 § 3, A.L. 1981 S.B. 410)
